steps.title: Identify what the blank must describe
steps.content: The passage says Bell worked closely with Wren to create original cover art. The blank fills in the type of relationship this represents — the word must precisely capture a collaborative working dynamic between two people.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — rebellion: Implies resistance or defiance against something — nothing in the passage suggests conflict or opposition. ✗
  • Choice B — partnership: Directly captures the collaborative working relationship described: two people, closely working together on a shared creative project. ✓
  • Choice C — discovery: Describes an outcome or finding, not a type of working relationship between two people. ✗
  • Choice D — disagreement: Implies conflict, which contradicts the passage's description of Bell and Wren working closely together. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
